title: Israel launches fresh strikes on Lebanon despite Trump criticism
snippet: Speaking on Tuesday, Trump said Israel's PM Benjamin Netanyahu needed "to be more responsible with respect to Lebanon".

title: UK investigating reports Russian warship fired warning shots near yacht in English Channel
snippet: The retired couple tell BBC Newsnight they tried to show the warship they had changed course in the English Channel before the shots were fired.

title: Brazil convicts Jair Bolsonaro's son of pursuing US help in father's legal battle
snippet: Eduardo Bolsonaro called the conviction "baseless and senseless".

title: Status quo at Jerusalem's holiest site under threat as Israeli nationalists flout rules
snippet: Israeli nationalists are increasingly flouting a convention on how faiths share the al-Aqsa mosque compound.

title: Russian artist and Putin critic shot dead in Poland
snippet: Robert Kuzovkov, who used the pseudonym Semyon Skrepetsky, has been known for his caricatures of politicians including Vladimir Putin.

title: 'We fear for our lives' - deadline looms for migrants to leave South Africa
snippet: Protesters have set 30 June as the date for all undocumented migrants to leave the country.

title: Equatorial Guinea government resigns after failing to meet targets
snippet: The vice-president says the government had barely reached 10% of its targets, without specifying them.

title: Australian shock jock wins A$12m payout after radio station tore up contract
snippet: Kyle Sandilands was sacked after an on-air spat with his co-host, who accused him of bullying.

title: German broadcaster removes TV intro after Elon Musk takes legal action
snippet: ZDF TV responded to a "cease and desist" letter after the tech trillionaire condemned the broadcaster's "outrageous lies".

title: Telegram challenges India ban over exam paper leak fears
snippet: Telegram CEO Pavel Durov has called the ban a "mistake", arguing it would punish millions of users.

title: Five big questions about the UK's under-16s social media ban
snippet: A ban is coming - but it's still not clear what it will mean for sites including Roblox, YouTube and WhatsApp.

title: When will social media ban start, and which apps will be affected?
snippet: The measures will see apps including TikTok and Snapchat banned for UK teens early in 2027.

title: What is Helium-3 and could we get it from the moon?
snippet: Helium-3 is expensive and demand is forecast to soar, so some are planning to mine it on the moon.

title: Social media ban - bold and blunt, but no silver bullet
snippet: The BBC's technology editor Zoe Kleinman on the big changes coming down the line for young people online.

title: Under-16s will be banned from social media from early 2027
snippet: Sites including Instagram, YouTube and TikTok will become inaccessible for millions of children, the prime minister has announced.
